page_content:
Formerly: GEOL489L.

GEOL647 Observational Geophysics (3 Credits)

Introduces graduate students to instrument design and performance, signal processing, data analysis and inverse theory in geophysics. Prerequisite: MATH140, MATH141, and PHYS141; and (PHYS161 or PHYS171).

Credit Only Granted for: GEOL7890 or GEOL647.
